message:
perf(pager): skip debug-only group commit telemetry work

Avoid computing lane-staging backlog, batch membership, flush lane stats, and staged byte totals unless the parallel WAL debug telemetry path actually needs them. Keep conflict/error warning fields intact.

Also relax the pager-layer worker-churn lane test to assert the queue-owned invariant: spawned workers stay within the configured lane range. Absolute lane ordering is already covered inside fsqlite-wal where the slot counter can be reset deterministically.
